fw_update_desc: Pick a nucleoos.bin and install it wirelessly — no USB cable. The image is written to the spare flash slot and only booted if it is valid; if the new firmware fails to start, the device automatically rolls back to this one. So it always stays bootable.
keep_powered: ⚠ Keep the device powered during the update. It reboots automatically when done.
app_shell_desc: The shell and apps live on the SD card, so they update independently of the firmware — either by syncing the card from a PC (deploy.ps1 -To <sd>) or over the network with npm run push-ota -- --host http://<ip>. After a web update, just reload the shell.
image_written: Image written. Rebooting into the new firmware…
update_complete: Update complete — device is back online. ✔
reboot_timeout: Device did not come back in time. Check it and refresh.
